modules.summary: Provides a form for users to authenticate with Username and Password, offers guest access and cookie information, and displays inline errors on invalid credentials.
modules.where_it_fits: Serves as the application's primary authentication entry point reached from the Home page and other public links; successful authentication redirects the user to the Dashboard, and the Log out action returns users to this page. It precedes access to course-specific navigation (Dashboard, My Courses, Course Page) and other authenticated modules.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is not authenticated (logged out) or browsing as a guest-capable session.

modules.summary: The Dashboard presents a personalized landing page with a Timeline of upcoming activities and a Calendar view for events across the user’s courses, plus edit-mode controls for adding and configuring blocks.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation bar as the Dashboard link and serving as the user’s primary landing/overview screen after login, it aggregates course activity and calendar data and links to the full calendar and calendar import/export pages. It complements course-level views (Course Page, Activities) by providing cross-course timelines and quick access to calendar management in the application lifecycle.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated (logged-in) user; user context loaded (profile and enrolled courses information available)

modules.summary: Displays all courses in which the student is enrolled as visual cards with controls for filtering, searching, sorting, layout, and quick actions (star or hide).
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation bar via the My Courses link (and reachable from Home or Dashboard), this module is the student-facing course listing page that precedes entering a specific Course Page; clicking a course card navigates to that course's main page where the course tab bar and breadcrumbs are shown.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Logged in as a student with an active account and enrollment records for one or more courses (or none).

modules.summary: Displays the full course content organized into collapsible sections that list activities and resources with type icons and clickable names.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation (Home → Dashboard → My Courses) when a user opens a specific course, the Course Page appears beneath the course title with the horizontal tab bar (Course, Participants, Grades, Activities, Competencies) and is used during course viewing alongside the Course Index sidebar.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Logged-in user who is enrolled in and has opened a specific course

modules.summary: Displays a searchable and filterable list of users enrolled in the current course, showing names, roles, groups, and last access information.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from within a course via the horizontal tab bar (Course → Participants) and linked in the course breadcrumbs and Course Index; it is part of the course-level user management and information views shown while viewing a course. Students see participant listings but not enrollment management options, while instructors use it for reviewing enrolments and accessing profiles.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is logged in and viewing a specific course page with course context loaded and enrollment data available.

modules.summary: Displays the student's own course grades in a user report table listing grade items, calculated weights, earned values, ranges, percentages, feedback, and each item's contribution to the course total.
modules.where_it_fits: Available from within a course via the horizontal tab bar (Home/Dashboard/My Courses → select course → Grades), it is the student-facing view alongside Course, Participants, Activities, and Competencies for reviewing personal grade information rather than the full gradebook. It is part of the course-level navigation and appears when viewing a specific course.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Logged in as a student and currently viewing a specific course that contains graded activities (permission to view own grades).

modules.summary: Displays an individual assignment’s details, submission interface, and submission/grading status including dates, description, student submissions, and teacher feedback.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from a Course Page via the Activities tab or the Course Index sidebar when viewing a course; it is the activity-level view where students submit work and later review grades and feedback as part of the course workflow.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Logged in as a course participant (student) enrolled in the course, viewing the specific course with the assignment published and visible in the course’s activity list.

modules.summary: Provides a consolidated, type-grouped overview of all course activities with expandable sections and direct links to each activity page.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the course-level horizontal tab bar (Course > Activities) when viewing a specific course, and reachable via the Course Index sidebar or activity breadcrumbs; it sits alongside Participants and Grades as a course navigation hub for locating activities. It is part of the course view lifecycle for browsing and jumping into individual activity pages.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: User is logged in and currently viewing a specific course page with course context and enrollment in that course.

modules.summary: Displays the student's personal information, activity links, privacy and report summaries, and provides access to an editable profile form with collapsible sections for personal details, picture, and optional fields.
modules.where_it_fits: Accessible from the top navigation user menu (Profile) available on every page, the Profile page is part of the user account area alongside Grades, Calendar, and Preferences and is reachable from the home/dashboard context; it complements course-level pages by linking to enrolled course profiles and reporting sections.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: Authenticated user viewing their own profile (logged in as the profile owner)

modules.summary: Ends the current authenticated session and returns the user to the login page, requiring re-authentication for protected pages.
modules.where_it_fits: Located in the user menu dropdown accessed from the initials icon in the top navigation bar (right side); it is available from anywhere in the app and acts as the final action in a user's session lifecycle by redirecting to the login page.
modules.assumed_state_on_entry: An active authenticated user session (user is logged in and has access to protected pages).
